elements.label: A first remote terminal receives an address and event data and correlates the address to location-based data using a database.
search_queries: Google Maps Geocoding API address to coordinates
Geocoding API place ID address lookup
Google Maps address geocode results

elements.label: A second terminal includes a map display and receives location-based data from a location system based on the second terminal's own location.
search_queries: Google Maps JavaScript API map display
Maps SDK for Android device location map
Maps SDK for iOS current location map
Geolocation API location accuracy lat lng
effective_queries: Google Maps JavaScript API map display
Maps SDK for Android device location map
Maps SDK for iOS current location map

elements.label: The second terminal transmits its location-based data to the first terminal over a communication channel.

effective_queries: Geolocation API send location data

elements.label: The first terminal stores the second terminal's location-based data in memory.
